          role: system
          text: '# Role: 订单数据检索查询助手

             

             

            ## Profile:

            - 你是一名专业的订单数据检索查询专家，专门通过系统API为用户查询订单相关的信息。

             

            ## 我的技能

             

            ### 按关键词搜索订单

            <skill>

            参数

            kw：关键词搜索，字符串，支持在多个字段中模糊匹配，无默认值。

            匹配字段

            订单号、订货单号、收货单位、收货人、联系电话、订单备注、内部沟通

            使用示例

            用户说“搜索一下北京的公司订单” → 提取 kw: "北京"

            用户说“查一下订单备注里有质量问题的订单” → 提取 kw: "质量问题"

            用户说“找一下收货人是李四的订单” → 提取 kw: "李四"

            用户说“联系电话是13800138000的订单” → 提取 kw: "13800138000"

            用户说“搜索订单号为TH_20260107_0001的订单” → 提取 kw: "TH_20260107_0001"，同时提取start_time:
            "2026-01-07 00:00"和start_time_end: "2026-01-07 23:59"

            用户说“内部沟通里需要优先处理的订单” → 提取 kw: "优先处理"

            用户说“查一下订单是TH_20251220_0010的订单” → 提取 kw: "TH_20251220_0010"

            用户说“查询15528271282”或者”查询15528271282订单“,这是类似于客户手机号 → 提取 client_name: "15528271282"

            </skill>




            ### 按订单创建时间查询

            <skill>

            参数

            start_time：开始时间，格式为"YYYY-MM-DD 00:00"。如果未指定开始时间，默认值为一个月前。

            start_time_end：结束时间，格式为"YYYY-MM-DD 23:59"。如果没有指定结束时间，此参数不传。

             

            使用示例

            时间中的提取逻辑只是一个demo,请根据当前的中国北京时间确定相对时间，今天的，一周等是相对

            用户说“查看今天创建的订单” → 提取 start_time: "YYYY-MM-DD 00:00"和start_time_end: "YYYY-MM-DD
            23:59"

            用户说“查一下最近一周的订单” → 提取 start_time: "YYYY-MM-DD 00:00"和 start_time_end: "YYYY-MM-DD
            23:59"

            用户说“看下最近一个月的订单” → 提取 start_time: "YYYY-MM-DD 00:00"（不指定结束时间，默认结束时间为当前）

            用户说“从2025年12月6日到2026年1月7日的订单” → 提取 start_time: "YYYY-MM-DD 00:00"和 start_time_end: "YYYY-MM-DD
            23:59"

            用户说“2025年12月6日的订单” → 提取 start_time: "YYYY-MM-DD 00:00"和 start_time_end: "YYYY-MM-DD
            23:59"

            用户说“查看上个月的订单” → 提取 start_time: "YYYY-MM-DD 00:00"和 start_time_end: "YYYY-MM-DD
            23:59"

            用户说“订单创建时间在2026年1月1日之后的” → 提取 start_time: "YYYY-MM-DD 00:00"（不指定结束时间）

            用户说“订单创建时间在2026年1月1日之前的” → 提取 start_time_end: "YYYY-MM-DD 23:59"（不指定开始时间，但默认开始时间为一个月前，即YYYY-MM-DD 00:00）

            用户说“查看所有订单” → 不传递时间参数（即不设置start_time和start_time_end）

            </skill>

             

            ### 按订单状态查询

             

            <skill>

            **参数** 

            `status`：订单状态，字符串，默认值为空，单选。 

             

            **状态映射** 

            - `pricing` 待核价 

            - `pending` 待审核 

            - `stock_up` 待出库 

            - `part_stock` 部分出库 

            - `shipped` 待发货 

            - `received` 待收货 

            - `finished` 已收货 

            - `cancelled` 已取消 

            - `forcedone` 强制完成 

             

            **使用示例** 

            用户说“查看待审核的订单” → 提取 `status: "pending"` 

            用户说“已发货的订单有哪些” → 提取 `status: "shipped"` 

            用户说“待收货的订单” → 提取 `status: "received"` 

            用户说“已收货的订单” → 提取 `status: "finished"` 

            用户说“查看已取消的订单” → 提取 `status: "cancelled"` 

            用户说“强制完成的订单” → 提取 `status: "forcedone"` 

            </skill>

             

            ### 按收款状态查询

             

            <skill>

            参数

            receipt_status：收款状态，字符串，无默认值，单选。

             

            状态映射

            oblig→ 待收款

            wait→ 待确认

            part→ 部分确认

            uncollect→ 部分收款

            paided→ 已收款

             

            使用示例

            用户说“查一下待收款的订单” → 提取 receipt_status: "oblig"

            用户说“有哪些待确认的收款” → 提取 receipt_status: "wait"

            用户说“部分收款的订单” → 提取 receipt_status: "uncollect"

            用户说“已收款的订单有哪些” → 提取 receipt_status: "paided"

            用户说“查看部分确认的订单” → 提取 receipt_status: "part"

            </skill>

             

            ### 按客户查询订单

            <skill>

            参数

            client_name：客户名字列表，字符串，多个客户用英文逗号分隔，无默认值，多选。

            说明

            用户查询时，需从用户输入中提取出客户名称（中文），然后通过后台数据模糊匹配对应的客户ID，最后将匹配到的客户ID填入参数

            需要提取具有分词特性的中文客户名称关键词，以便后续进行数据库模糊匹配

            最终由大模型判断并确定客户对应的ID

             

            使用示例

            用户说“查看华为的订单” → 提取"华为"，后台模糊匹配客户名称中包含"华为"的客户，得到对应客户ID

            用户说“查询阿里巴巴和腾讯的订单” → 提取"阿里巴巴"、"腾讯"，后台分别模糊匹配这两个客户名称

            用户说“查一下华为、小米、OPPO的订单” → 提取"华为"、"小米"、"OPPO"，后台分别模糊匹配这些客户名称

            用户说“找一下客户A的订单” → 提取"客户A"，后台模糊匹配客户名称中包含"客户A"的客户

            用户说“搜索一下北京科技公司的订单” → 提取"北京科技公司"，后台模糊匹配客户名称中包含"北京科技公司"的客户

            </skill>

        - id: b43c1725-49b4-4892-aa32-06049c982d0f
          role: system
          text: '# Role: 退单数据检索查询助手

             

             

            ## Profile:

            - 你是一名专业的退单数据检索查询专家，专门通过系统API为用户查询退单相关的信息。

             

            ## 我的技能

             

            ### 按关键词搜索退单

            <skill>

            参数

            kw：关键词搜索，字符串，支持在多个字段中模糊匹配，无默认值。

            匹配字段

            退单编号、收货单位、收货人、联系电话、退单备注、内部沟通

            使用示例

            用户说“搜索一下北京的公司” → 提取 kw: "北京"

            用户说“查一下退单备注里有加急的退单” → 提取 kw: "加急"

            用户说“找一下收货人是张三的退单” → 提取 kw: "张三"

            用户说“联系电话是13800138000的退单” → 提取 kw: "13800138000"

            用户说“搜索退单编号为DH_20260106_0002的退单” → 提取 kw: "DH_20260106_0002"，同时提取start_time: "2026-01-06
            00:00"和start_time_end: "2026-01-06 23:59"

            用户说“内部沟通里有重要客户的退单” → 提取 kw: "重要客户"

            </skill>



            ### 按退单创建时间查询

            <skill>

            参数

            start_time：开始时间，格式为"YYYY-MM-DD 00:00"。如果未指定开始时间，默认值为一个月前。

            start_time_end：结束时间，格式为"YYYY-MM-DD 23:59"。如果没有指定结束时间，此参数不传。

             

            使用示例

            时间中的提取逻辑只是一个demo,请根据当前的中国北京时间确定相对时间，今天的，一周等是相对

            用户说“查看今天创建的退单” → 提取 start_time: "YYYY-MM-DD 00:00"和start_time_end: "YYYY-MM-DD
            23:59"

            用户说“查一下最近一周的退单” → 提取 start_time: "YYYY-MM-DD 00:00"和 start_time_end: "YYYY-MM-DD
            23:59"

            用户说“看下最近一个月的退单” → 提取 start_time: "YYYY-MM-DD 00:00"（不指定结束时间，默认结束时间为当前）

            用户说“从2025年12月6日到2026年1月7日的退单” → 提取 start_time: "YYYY-MM-DD 00:00"和 start_time_end: "YYYY-MM-DD
            23:59"

            用户说“2025年12月6日的退单” → 提取 start_time: "YYYY-MM-DD 00:00"和 start_time_end: "YYYY-MM-DD
            23:59"

            用户说“查看上个月的退单” → 提取 start_time: "YYYY-MM-DD 00:00"和 start_time_end: "YYYY-MM-DD
            23:59"

            用户说“退单创建时间在2026年1月1日之后的” → 提取 start_time: "YYYY-MM-DD 00:00"（不指定结束时间）

            用户说“退单创建时间在2026年1月1日之前的” → 提取 start_time_end: "YYYY-MM-DD 23:59"（不指定开始时间，但默认开始时间为一个月前，即YYYY-MM-DD 00:00）

            用户说“查看所有退单” → 不传递时间参数（即不设置start_time和start_time_end）

            用户说“查询15528271282”或者”查询15528271282退单“,这是类似于客户手机号 → 提取 client_name: "15528271282"

            </skill>

             

            ### 按退货状态查询

            <skill>

            参数

            status：退货状态，字符串，默认值为空，单选。

            状态映射

            return_aud待审核

            shipp_cust待发货

            shipped待收货

            refunded待退款

            finished已完成

            cancelled已取消

            使用示例

            用户说"查看待审核的退货单" → 提取 status: "return_aud"

            用户说"待发货的退货单有哪些" → 提取 status: "shipp_cust"

            用户说"待收货的退货单" → 提取 status: "shipped"

            用户说"待退款的退货单" → 提取 status: "refunded"

            用户说"已完成的退货单" → 提取 status: "finished"

            用户说"已取消的退货单" → 提取 status: "cancelled"

            </skill>

             

            ### 按客户查询退单

            <skill>

            参数

            client_name：客户名字列表，字符串，多个客户用英文逗号分隔，无默认值，多选。

            说明

            用户查询时，需从用户输入中提取出客户名称（中文），然后通过后台数据模糊匹配对应的客户ID，最后将匹配到的客户ID填入参数

            需要提取具有分词特性的中文客户名称关键词，以便后续进行数据库模糊匹配

            最终由大模型判断并确定客户对应的ID

             

            使用示例

            用户说“查看华为的退单” → 提取"华为"，后台模糊匹配客户名称中包含"华为"的客户，得到对应客户ID

            用户说“查询阿里巴巴和腾讯的退单” → 提取"阿里巴巴"、"腾讯"，后台分别模糊匹配这两个客户名称

            用户说“查一下华为、小米、OPPO的退单” → 提取"华为"、"小米"、"OPPO"，后台分别模糊匹配这些客户名称

            用户说“找一下客户A的退单” → 提取"客户A"，后台模糊匹配客户名称中包含"客户A"的客户

            用户说“搜索一下北京科技公司的退单” → 提取"北京科技公司"，后台模糊匹配客户名称中包含"北京科技公司"的客户

            </skill>


            ### 按退货类型查询

            <skill>

            参数

            return_type：退货类型，字符串，无默认值，单选。

            类型映射

            return_refund退货退款

            refund_only仅退款

            使用示例

            用户说"查看退货退款的退货单" → 提取 return_type: "return_refund"

            用户说"仅退款的退货单有哪些" → 提取 return_type: "refund_only"

            用户说"帮我查一下退货退款的退货单" → 提取 return_type: "return_refund"

            用户说"不是仅退款的退货单" → 注意：本参数为单选，通常不用于否定查询，如用户明确要求非仅退款，可转换为查询"退货退款"

            </skill>


            ## 输出

            1:退单查询条件可以为空，表示查询当前的默认退单

            2:严格按照我的技能中列出的skill参数，不得自己创造

            3:将匹配出来的状态信息，放到一个JSON代码块中，例子如下



            ```json

            {"kw":"成都","status":"shipped","start_time":"2026-01-04 11:00"}

            ```'

    - data:
        code: "\"\"\"\n参数解析器\n只负责从条件字符串中提取参数\n\"\"\"\n\nimport json\nimport re\nfrom\
          \ typing import Dict, Any\n\ndef clean_json_string(json_str: str) -> str:\n\
          \    \"\"\"\n    清理JSON字符串，移除AI思考过程和代码块标记\n    \"\"\"\n    if not json_str\
          \ or not isinstance(json_str, str):\n        return \"\"\n    \n    # 查找最后一个```json代码块\n\
          \    pattern = r'```json\\s*\\n(.*?)\\n\\s*```'\n    matches = re.findall(pattern,\
          \ json_str, re.DOTALL)\n    \n    if matches:\n        extracted = matches[-1]\n\
          \        return extracted.strip()\n    \n    # 查找普通的```代码块\n    pattern2\
          \ = r'```\\s*\\n(.*?)\\n\\s*```'\n    matches2 = re.findall(pattern2, json_str,\
          \ re.DOTALL)\n    \n    if matches2:\n        extracted = matches2[-1]\n\
          \        cleaned = extracted.strip()\n        if (cleaned.startswith('[')\
          \ and cleaned.endswith(']')) or \\\n           (cleaned.startswith('{')\
          \ and cleaned.endswith('}')):\n            return cleaned\n    \n    # 如果没有代码块标记，直接返回原始字符串\n\
          \    cleaned_str = json_str.strip()\n    if cleaned_str.startswith('[')\
          \ and cleaned_str.endswith(']'):\n        try:\n            json.loads(cleaned_str)\n\
          \            return cleaned_str\n        except json.JSONDecodeError:\n\
          \            pass\n    \n    if cleaned_str.startswith('{') and cleaned_str.endswith('}'):\n\
          \        try:\n            json.loads(cleaned_str)\n            return cleaned_str\n\
          \        except json.JSONDecodeError:\n            pass\n    \n    return\
          \ \"\"\n\ndef extract_json_from_ai_response(text: str) -> str:\n    \"\"\
          \"\n    专门从AI响应中提取JSON数据\n    \"\"\"\n    if not text or not isinstance(text,\
          \ str):\n        return \"\"\n    \n    # 方法1: 查找```json代码块\n    json_blocks\
          \ = re.findall(r'```json\\s*\\n(.*?)\\n\\s*```', text, re.DOTALL)\n    if\
          \ json_blocks:\n        return json_blocks[-1].strip()\n    \n    # 方法2:\
          \ 查找普通```代码块\n    code_blocks = re.findall(r'```\\s*\\n(.*?)\\n\\s*```',\
          \ text, re.DOTALL)\n    if code_blocks:\n        for block in reversed(code_blocks):\n\
          \            block = block.strip()\n            if (block.startswith('[')\
          \ and block.endswith(']')) or \\\n               (block.startswith('{')\
          \ and block.endswith('}')):\n                try:\n                    json.loads(block)\n\
          \                    return block\n                except:\n           \
          \         continue\n    \n    # 方法3: 直接查找JSON数组或对象\n    json_pattern = r'(\\\
          [\\s*\\{.*?\\}\\s*\\])|(\\{\\s*\".*?\"\\s*:\\s*.*?\\})'\n    matches = re.findall(json_pattern,\
          \ text, re.DOTALL)\n    \n    for match in matches:\n        for group in\
          \ match:\n            if group:\n                try:\n                \
          \    json.loads(group.strip())\n                    return group.strip()\n\
          \                except:\n                    continue\n    \n    return\
          \ \"\"\n\ndef main(condition: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n    \"\"\"\n    Dify工作流主函数\
          \ - 只解析参数\n    \n    Args:\n        condition: 查询条件字符串\n        \n    Returns:\n\
          \        解析结果字典\n    \"\"\"\n    result = {\n        \"success\": False,\n\
          \        \"message\": \"\",\n        \"params\": {}\n    }\n    \n    try:\n\
          \        if not condition or not isinstance(condition, str):\n         \
          \   result[\"message\"] = \"查询条件为空\"\n            return result\n      \
          \  \n        # 清理和解析条件参数\n        cleaned_condition = clean_json_string(condition)\n\
          \        if not cleaned_condition:\n            # 尝试从AI响应中提取\n         \
          \   cleaned_condition = extract_json_from_ai_response(condition)\n     \
          \   \n        if cleaned_condition:\n            # 尝试解析为JSON\n         \
          \   try:\n                params = json.loads(cleaned_condition)\n     \
          \           if isinstance(params, dict):\n                    result[\"\
          params\"] = params\n                    result[\"success\"] = True\n   \
          \                 result[\"message\"] = \"成功解析JSON参数\"\n               \
          \ else:\n                    result[\"message\"] = \"JSON格式错误：应为对象格式\"\n\
          \            except json.JSONDecodeError as e:\n                result[\"\
          message\"] = f\"JSON解析错误: {e}\"\n        else:\n            # 不是JSON格式，按文本处理\n\
          \            result[\"params\"] = {\"text\": condition.strip()}\n      \
          \      result[\"success\"] = True\n            result[\"message\"] = \"\
          按纯文本处理\"\n        \n        return result\n        \n    except Exception\
          \ as e:\n        result[\"message\"] = f\"条件解析异常: {str(e)}\"\n        return\
          \ result\n        \n# # 独立运行测试\n# if __name__ == \"__main__\":\n#     import\
          \ sys\n    \n#     if len(sys.argv) < 2:\n#         print(\"用法: python param_parser.py\
          \ <condition>\")\n#         print(\"示例1: python param_parser.py '测试客户1,测试客户2'\"\
          )\n#         print(\"示例2: python param_parser.py '{\\\"client_name\\\":\

          \\n{\\\"client_name\\\": \\\"测试客户\\\"}\\\\n```'\")\n#         sys.exit(1)\n\
          \    \n#     condition = sys.argv[1]\n#     result = main(condition)\n#\

        code: "\"\"\"\n客户查询逻辑模块\n专门处理client_name到client_id的转换\n当client_name为空时直接返回\n\
          \"\"\"\n\nimport json\nfrom urllib.parse import urljoin, quote\nimport requests\n\
          from typing import Dict, Any, Tuple, List, Optional\n\ndef query_client_by_name(client_names:\
          \ str, dhb_skey: str, current_manager_api: str) -> Tuple[bool, Optional[str],\
          \ List[str]]:\n    \"\"\"\n    根据客户名称查询client_id\n    \n    Args:\n    \
          \    client_names: 客户名称，多个用逗号分隔\n        dhb_skey: 用户认证密钥\n        current_manager_api:\
          \ 管理API地址\n        \n    Returns:\n        Tuple[是否成功, 错误信息, client_id列表]\n\
          \    \"\"\"\n    if not dhb_skey or not current_manager_api:\n        return\
          \ False, \"认证密钥或API地址为空\", []\n    \n    try:\n        # 确保API地址格式正确\n \
          \       if not current_manager_api.startswith((\"http://\", \"https://\"\
          )):\n            current_manager_api = f\"https://{current_manager_api}\"\
          \n        \n        # 构建客户查询URL\n        encoded_names = quote(client_names.strip())\n\
          \        client_url = urljoin(current_manager_api, f\"/Api/v1/client?page=0&pageSize=100&kw={encoded_names}\"\
          )\n        \n        headers = {\n            \"Content-Type\": \"application/json;\
          \ charset=utf-8\",\n            \"Accept\": \"application/json; charset=utf-8\"\
          \n        }\n        \n        # 添加认证密钥\n        query_params = {\n    \
          \        \"dhb_skey\": dhb_skey\n        }\n        \n        # 发送客户查询请求\n\
          \        response = requests.get(client_url, headers=headers, params=query_params,\
          \ timeout=10.0)\n        response.raise_for_status()\n        \n       \
          \ result = response.json()\n        \n        # 检查响应状态\n        if result.get(\"\
          status\") != \"T\":\n            return False, f\"客户查询失败: {result.get('msg',\
          \ '未知错误')}\", []\n        \n        # 提取客户列表\n        data = result.get(\"\
          data\", {})\n        client_list = data.get(\"list\", [])\n        \n  \
          \      if not client_list:\n            return False, f\"客户没有找到: {client_names}\"\
          , []\n        \n        # 提取client_id\n        client_ids = []\n       \
          \ for client in client_list:\n            client_id = client.get(\"client_id\"\
          )\n            if client_id:\n                client_ids.append(str(client_id))\n\
          \        \n        if not client_ids:\n            return False, f\"未找到有效的client_id:\
          \ {client_names}\", []\n        \n        return True, None, client_ids\n\
          \        \n    except requests.exceptions.Timeout:\n        return False,\
          \ \"客户查询请求超时\", []\n    except requests.exceptions.RequestException as e:\n\
          \        return False, f\"客户查询请求错误: {e}\", []\n    except json.JSONDecodeError\
          \ as e:\n        return False, f\"客户查询JSON解析错误: {e}\", []\n    except Exception\
          \ as e:\n        return False, f\"客户查询异常: {e}\", []\n\ndef process_client_names(params:\
          \ Dict[str, Any], dhb_skey: str, current_manager_api: str) -> Dict[str,\
          \ Any]:\n    \"\"\"\n    处理客户名称查询，将client_name转换为client_id\n    \n    Args:\n\
          \        params: 参数字典，可能包含client_name\n        dhb_skey: 用户认证密钥\n      \
          \  current_manager_api: 管理API地址\n        \n    Returns:\n        处理后的参数字典\n\
          \    \"\"\"\n    result = {\n        \"success\": False,\n        \"message\"\
          : \"\",\n        \"params\": params.copy()  # 复制原始参数\n    }\n    \n    try:\n\
          \        # 检查是否需要查询客户\n        if \"client_name\" not in params:\n     \
          \       result[\"success\"] = True\n            result[\"message\"] = \"\
          参数中无client_name，无需查询客户\"\n            return result\n        \n        client_names\
          \ = params[\"client_name\"]\n        if not client_names or (isinstance(client_names,\
          \ str) and not client_names.strip()):\n            result[\"success\"] =\
          \ True\n            result[\"message\"] = \"client_name为空，跳过查询\"\n     \
          \       return result\n        \n        # 查询客户获取client_id\n        success,\
          \ error_msg, client_ids = query_client_by_name(client_names, dhb_skey, current_manager_api)\n\
          \        \n        if not success:\n            result[\"message\"] = error_msg\n\
          \            return result\n        \n        # 更新参数：添加client_id，保留client_name\n\
          \        if client_ids:\n            result[\"params\"][\"client_id\"] =\
          \ \",\".join(client_ids)\n            result[\"success\"] = True\n     \
          \       result[\"message\"] = f\"成功查询到 {len(client_ids)} 个client_id\"\n\
          \        else:\n            result[\"message\"] = \"查询到client_id列表为空\"\n\
          \        \n        return result\n        \n    except Exception as e:\n\
          \        result[\"message\"] = f\"处理客户名称异常: {str(e)}\"\n        return result\n\
          \ndef main(params: Dict[str, Any], dhb_skey: str, current_manager_api: str)\
          \ -> Dict[str, Any]:\n    \"\"\"\n    Dify工作流主函数 - 客户查询逻辑\n    \n    Args:\n\
          \        params: 参数字典\n        dhb_skey: 用户认证密钥\n        current_manager_api:\
          \ 管理API地址\n        \n    Returns:\n        处理结果\n    \"\"\"\n    return\
          \ process_client_names(params, dhb_skey, current_manager_api)\n\n# 测试代码\n\
          # if __name__ == \"__main__\":\n#     import sys\n    \n#     if len(sys.argv)\
          \ < 4:\n#         print(\"用法: python client_query.py <params_json> <dhb_skey>\
          \ <current_manager_api>\")\n#         print(\"示例: python client_query.py\
          \ '{\\\"client_name\\\": \\\"测试客户\\\"}' 'your_key' 'https://yadmin.example.com'\"\
          )\n#         sys.exit(1)\n    \n#     try:\n#         params = json.loads(sys.argv[1])\n\
          #         dhb_skey = sys.argv[2]\n#         current_manager_api = sys.argv[3]\n\
          \        \n#         result = main(params, dhb_skey, current_manager_api)\n\
          #         print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))\n#   \
          \  except json.JSONDecodeError as e:\n#         print(f\"JSON解析错误: {e}\"\
          )\n#         sys.exit(1)"

        code: "\"\"\"\n客户查询逻辑模块\n专门处理client_name到client_id的转换\n当client_name为空时直接返回\n\
          \"\"\"\n\nimport json\nfrom urllib.parse import urljoin, quote\nimport requests\n\
          from typing import Dict, Any, Tuple, List, Optional\n\ndef query_client_by_name(client_names:\
          \ str, dhb_skey: str, current_manager_api: str) -> Tuple[bool, Optional[str],\
          \ List[str]]:\n    \"\"\"\n    根据客户名称查询client_id\n    \n    Args:\n    \
          \    client_names: 客户名称，多个用逗号分隔\n        dhb_skey: 用户认证密钥\n        current_manager_api:\
          \ 管理API地址\n        \n    Returns:\n        Tuple[是否成功, 错误信息, client_id列表]\n\
          \    \"\"\"\n    if not dhb_skey or not current_manager_api:\n        return\
          \ False, \"认证密钥或API地址为空\", []\n    \n    try:\n        # 确保API地址格式正确\n \
          \       if not current_manager_api.startswith((\"http://\", \"https://\"\
          )):\n            current_manager_api = f\"https://{current_manager_api}\"\
          \n        \n        # 构建客户查询URL\n        encoded_names = quote(client_names.strip())\n\
          \        client_url = urljoin(current_manager_api, f\"/Api/v1/client?page=0&pageSize=100&kw={encoded_names}\"\
          )\n        \n        headers = {\n            \"Content-Type\": \"application/json;\
          \ charset=utf-8\",\n            \"Accept\": \"application/json; charset=utf-8\"\
          \n        }\n        \n        # 添加认证密钥\n        query_params = {\n    \
          \        \"dhb_skey\": dhb_skey\n        }\n        \n        # 发送客户查询请求\n\
          \        response = requests.get(client_url, headers=headers, params=query_params,\
          \ timeout=10.0)\n        response.raise_for_status()\n        \n       \
          \ result = response.json()\n        \n        # 检查响应状态\n        if result.get(\"\
          status\") != \"T\":\n            return False, f\"客户查询失败: {result.get('msg',\
          \ '未知错误')}\", []\n        \n        # 提取客户列表\n        data = result.get(\"\
          data\", {})\n        client_list = data.get(\"list\", [])\n        \n  \
          \      if not client_list:\n            return False, f\"客户没有找到: {client_names}\"\
          , []\n        \n        # 提取client_id\n        client_ids = []\n       \
          \ for client in client_list:\n            client_id = client.get(\"client_id\"\
          )\n            if client_id:\n                client_ids.append(str(client_id))\n\
          \        \n        if not client_ids:\n            return False, f\"未找到有效的client_id:\
          \ {client_names}\", []\n        \n        return True, None, client_ids\n\
          \        \n    except requests.exceptions.Timeout:\n        return False,\
          \ \"客户查询请求超时\", []\n    except requests.exceptions.RequestException as e:\n\
          \        return False, f\"客户查询请求错误: {e}\", []\n    except json.JSONDecodeError\
          \ as e:\n        return False, f\"客户查询JSON解析错误: {e}\", []\n    except Exception\
          \ as e:\n        return False, f\"客户查询异常: {e}\", []\n\ndef process_client_names(params:\
          \ Dict[str, Any], dhb_skey: str, current_manager_api: str) -> Dict[str,\
          \ Any]:\n    \"\"\"\n    处理客户名称查询，将client_name转换为client_id\n    \n    Args:\n\
          \        params: 参数字典，可能包含client_name\n        dhb_skey: 用户认证密钥\n      \
          \  current_manager_api: 管理API地址\n        \n    Returns:\n        处理后的参数字典\n\
          \    \"\"\"\n    result = {\n        \"success\": False,\n        \"message\"\
          : \"\",\n        \"params\": params.copy()  # 复制原始参数\n    }\n    \n    try:\n\
          \        # 检查是否需要查询客户\n        if \"client_name\" not in params:\n     \
          \       result[\"success\"] = True\n            result[\"message\"] = \"\
          参数中无client_name，无需查询客户\"\n            return result\n        \n        client_names\
          \ = params[\"client_name\"]\n        if not client_names or (isinstance(client_names,\
          \ str) and not client_names.strip()):\n            result[\"success\"] =\
          \ True\n            result[\"message\"] = \"client_name为空，跳过查询\"\n     \
          \       return result\n        \n        # 查询客户获取client_id\n        success,\
          \ error_msg, client_ids = query_client_by_name(client_names, dhb_skey, current_manager_api)\n\
          \        \n        if not success:\n            result[\"message\"] = error_msg\n\
          \            return result\n        \n        # 更新参数：添加client_id，保留client_name\n\
          \        if client_ids:\n            result[\"params\"][\"client_id\"] =\
          \ \",\".join(client_ids)\n            result[\"success\"] = True\n     \
          \       result[\"message\"] = f\"成功查询到 {len(client_ids)} 个client_id\"\n\
          \        else:\n            result[\"message\"] = \"查询到client_id列表为空\"\n\
          \        \n        return result\n        \n    except Exception as e:\n\
          \        result[\"message\"] = f\"处理客户名称异常: {str(e)}\"\n        return result\n\
          \ndef main(params: Dict[str, Any], dhb_skey: str, current_manager_api: str)\
          \ -> Dict[str, Any]:\n    \"\"\"\n    Dify工作流主函数 - 客户查询逻辑\n    \n    Args:\n\
          \        params: 参数字典\n        dhb_skey: 用户认证密钥\n        current_manager_api:\

          \ process_client_names(params, dhb_skey, current_manager_api)\n\n# 测试代码\n\

          \ < 4:\n#         print(\"用法: python client_query.py <params_json> <dhb_skey>\

          \ '{\\\"client_name\\\": \\\"测试客户\\\"}' 'your_key' 'https://yadmin.example.com'\"\
          )\n#         sys.exit(1)\n    \n#     try:\n#         params = json.loads(sys.argv[1])\n\
          #         dhb_skey = sys.argv[2]\n#         current_manager_api = sys.argv[3]\n\
          \        \n#         result = main(params, dhb_skey, current_manager_api)\n\
          #         print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))\n#   \
          \  except json.JSONDecodeError as e:\n#         print(f\"JSON解析错误: {e}\"\
          )\n#         sys.exit(1)"

        code: "\"\"\"\n退货单查询模块\n接收处理后的参数，查询退货单并返回结果\n\"\"\"\n\nimport json\nfrom urllib.parse\
          \ import urlencode, urljoin\nimport requests\nfrom typing import Dict, Any,\
          \ List\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta\n\ndef build_order_query_params(condition_data:\
          \ Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n    \"\"\"\n    构建退货单查询参数\n    \n\
          \    Args:\n        condition_data: 条件参数字典\n        \n    Returns:\n   \
          \     构建好的查询参数\n    \"\"\"\n    # 默认参数\n    params = {\n        \"page\"\
          : 1,\n        \"pageSize\": 10\n    }\n    \n    # 从条件数据中提取参数\n    if condition_data:\n\
          \        for key, value in condition_data.items():\n            if value\
          \ is not None and value != \"\":\n                if key == \"type\" and\
          \ value == \"return\":\n                    continue\n\n               \
          \ if key == \"action\":\n                    continue\n\n              \
          \  # 处理时间参数\n                if key in [\"start_time\", \"start_time_end\"\
          ]:\n                    params[key] = str(value).replace(\" \", \"+\")\n\
          \                else:\n                    params[key] = str(value)\n \
          \   \n    # 如果没有提供start_time，则设置默认值为最近一个月\n    if \"start_time\" not in\
          \ params:\n        one_month_ago = datetime.now() - timedelta(days=30)\n\
          \        params[\"start_time\"] = one_month_ago.strftime(\"%Y-%m-%d+00:00\"\
          )\n    \n    return params\n\ndef make_api_request(params: Dict[str, Any],\
          \ dhb_skey: str, current_manager_api: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n    \"\"\"\
          \n    调用退货单查询API接口\n    \n    Args:\n        params: 查询参数\n        dhb_skey:\
          \ 用户认证密钥\n        current_manager_api: 管理API地址\n        \n    Returns:\n\
          \        API响应数据\n    \"\"\"\n    if not current_manager_api:\n        return\
          \ {}\n    \n    try:\n        # 构建完整的退货单查询URL\n        order_endpoint =\
          \ \"/RestfulApi/returns\"\n        base_url = urljoin(current_manager_api,\
          \ order_endpoint)\n        \n        # 添加认证密钥\n        query_params = params.copy()\n\
          \        if dhb_skey and dhb_skey.strip():\n            query_params[\"\
          dhb_skey\"] = dhb_skey\n        \n        # 构建完整URL\n        query_string\
          \ = urlencode(query_params, doseq=True, safe='+')\n        full_url = f\"\
          {base_url}?{query_string}\"\n        \n        headers = {\n           \
          \ \"Content-Type\": \"application/json; charset=utf-8\",\n            \"\
          Accept\": \"application/json; charset=utf-8\"\n        }\n        \n   \
          \     # 发送请求\n        response = requests.get(full_url, headers=headers,\
          \ timeout=30.0)\n        response.raise_for_status()\n        \n       \
          \ return response.json()\n        \n    except requests.exceptions.Timeout:\n\
          \        return {}\n    except requests.exceptions.RequestException as e:\n\
          \        return {}\n    except json.JSONDecodeError as e:\n        return\
          \ {}\n    except Exception as e:\n        return {}\n\ndef format_orders_text(orders:\
          \ List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> str:\n    \"\"\"\n    格式化退货单信息为文本\n    \"\"\"\
          \n    if not orders:\n        return \"暂无退货单数据\"\n    \n    try:\n     \
          \   texts = []\n        for i, order in enumerate(orders[:30], 1):  # 最多显示30个退货单\n\
          \            orders_num = order.get(\"returns_num\", \"N/A\")\n        \
          \    text = f\"{orders_num}\"\n            texts.append(text)\n        \n\
          \        return \",\".join(texts)\n        \n    except Exception as e:\n\
          \        return f\"共{len(orders)}条退货单数据（注意：当前每次最多返回10条）\"\n\ndef query_orders(params:\
          \ Dict[str, Any], dhb_skey: str, current_manager_api: str) -> Dict[str,\
          \ Any]:\n    \"\"\"\n    查询退货单\n    \n    Args:\n        params: 查询参数字典\n\
          \        dhb_skey: 用户认证密钥\n        current_manager_api: 管理API地址\n      \
          \  \n    Returns:\n        查询结果字典\n    \"\"\"\n    result = {\n        \"\
          success\": False,\n        \"message\": \"\",\n        \"ai_agent_manager_return\"\
          : [],\n        \"ai_agent_manager_return_text\": \"\"\n    }\n    \n   \
          \ try:\n        # 验证必要参数\n        if not dhb_skey or not dhb_skey.strip():\n\
          \            result[\"message\"] = \"认证密钥无效\"\n            return result\n\
          \        \n        if not current_manager_api or not current_manager_api.strip():\n\
          \            result[\"message\"] = \"API地址无效\"\n            return result\n\
          \        \n        # 确保API地址格式正确\n        if not current_manager_api.startswith((\"\
          http://\", \"https://\")):\n            current_manager_api = f\"https://{current_manager_api}\"\
          \n        \n        # 构建查询参数\n        query_params = build_order_query_params(params)\n\
          \        \n        # 调用退货单查询API\n        api_response = make_api_request(query_params,\
          \ dhb_skey, current_manager_api)\n        \n        if not api_response\
          \ or not isinstance(api_response, dict):\n            result[\"message\"\
          ] = \"API返回数据无效\"\n            return result\n        \n        # 检查API响应状态\n\
          \        if api_response.get(\"code\") != 200:\n            msg = api_response.get(\"\
          msg\") or api_response.get(\"message\", \"API请求失败\")\n            result[\"\
          message\"] = f\"API请求失败: {msg}\"\n            return result\n        \n\
          \        # 提取退货单数据\n        data = api_response.get(\"data\", {})\n    \
          \    if not isinstance(data, dict):\n            result[\"message\"] = \"\
          API返回数据格式错误\"\n            return result\n        \n        orders = data.get(\"\
          list\", [])\n        if not isinstance(orders, list):\n            orders\
          \ = []\n        \n        # 设置返回结果\n        result[\"success\"] = True\n\
          \        result[\"message\"] = f\"查询成功，共{len(orders)}条退货单（注意：当前每次最多返回10条）\"\
          \n        result[\"ai_agent_manager_return\"] = orders\n        result[\"\
          ai_agent_manager_return_text\"] = format_orders_text(orders)\n        \n\
          \        return result\n        \n    except Exception as e:\n        result[\"\
          message\"] = f\"处理退货单查询时发生错误: {str(e)}\"\n        return result\n\ndef main(params:\
          \ Dict[str, Any], dhb_skey: str, current_manager_api: str) -> Dict[str,\
          \ Any]:\n    \"\"\"\n    Dify工作流主函数 - 退货单查询逻辑\n    \n    Args:\n       \
          \ params: 查询参数字典\n        dhb_skey: 用户认证密钥\n        current_manager_api:\
          \ 管理API地址\n        \n    Returns:\n        查询结果\n    \"\"\"\n    return\
          \ query_orders(params, dhb_skey, current_manager_api)\n\n# 测试代码\n# if __name__\
          \ == \"__main__\":\n#     import sys\n    \n#     if len(sys.argv) < 4:\n\
          #         print(\"用法: python order_query.py <params_json> <dhb_skey> <current_manager_api>\"\
          )\n#         print(\"示例: python order_query.py '{\\\"client_id\\\": \\\"\
          1,2\\\"}' 'your_key' 'https://yadmin.example.com'\")\n#         sys.exit(1)\n\
          \    \n#     try:\n#         params = json.loads(sys.argv[1])\n#       \
          \  dhb_skey = sys.argv[2]\n#         current_manager_api = sys.argv[3]\n\
          \        \n#         result = main(params, dhb_skey, current_manager_api)\n\
          #         print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))\n#   \
          \  except json.JSONDecodeError as e:\n#         print(f\"JSON解析错误: {e}\"\
          )\n#         sys.exit(1)"

          \ re.DOTALL)\n    \n    if matches2:\n        extracted = matches2[-1]\n\
          \        cleaned = extracted.strip()\n        if (cleaned.startswith('[')\
          \ and cleaned.endswith(']')) or \\\n           (cleaned.startswith('{')\
          \ and cleaned.endswith('}')):\n            return cleaned\n    \n    # 如果没有代码块标记，直接返回原始字符串\n\
          \    cleaned_str = json_str.strip()\n    if cleaned_str.startswith('[')\
          \ and cleaned_str.endswith(']'):\n        try:\n            json.loads(cleaned_str)\n\
          \            return cleaned_str\n        except json.JSONDecodeError:\n\
          \            pass\n    \n    if cleaned_str.startswith('{') and cleaned_str.endswith('}'):\n\
          \        try:\n            json.loads(cleaned_str)\n            return cleaned_str\n\
          \        except json.JSONDecodeError:\n            pass\n    \n    return\

          \ str):\n        return \"\"\n    \n    # 方法1: 查找```json代码块\n    json_blocks\
          \ = re.findall(r'```json\\s*\\n(.*?)\\n\\s*```', text, re.DOTALL)\n    if\

        code: "\"\"\"\n商品查询模块\n接收处理后的参数，查询商品并返回结果\n\"\"\"\n\nimport json\nfrom urllib.parse\
          \ import urlencode, urljoin\nimport requests\nfrom typing import Dict, Any,\
          \ List\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta\n\ndef build_order_query_params(condition_data:\
          \ Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n    \"\"\"\n    构建商品查询参数\n    \n \
          \   Args:\n        condition_data: 条件参数字典\n        \n    Returns:\n    \
          \    构建好的查询参数\n    \"\"\"\n    # 默认参数\n    params = {\n        \"page\"\
          : 1,\n        \"pageSize\": 10\n    }\n    \n    # 从条件数据中提取参数\n    if condition_data:\n\
          \        for key, value in condition_data.items():\n            if value\
          \ is not None and value != \"\":\n                if key == \"type\" and\
          \ value == \"goods\":\n                    continue\n\n                if\
          \ key == \"action\":\n                    continue\n\n                #\
          \ 处理时间参数\n                params[key] = str(value)\n    \n    return params\n\
          \ndef make_api_request(params: Dict[str, Any], dhb_skey: str, current_manager_api:\
          \ str) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n    \"\"\"\n    调用商品查询API接口\n    \n    Args:\n\
          \        params: 查询参数\n        dhb_skey: 用户认证密钥\n        current_manager_api:\
          \ 管理API地址\n        \n    Returns:\n        API响应数据\n    \"\"\"\n    if not\
          \ current_manager_api:\n        return {}\n    \n    try:\n        # 构建完整的商品查询URL\n\
          \        order_endpoint = \"/RestfulApi/goods\"\n        base_url = urljoin(current_manager_api,\
          \ order_endpoint)\n        \n        # 添加认证密钥\n        query_params = params.copy()\n\
          \        if dhb_skey and dhb_skey.strip():\n            query_params[\"\
          dhb_skey\"] = dhb_skey\n        \n        # 构建完整URL\n        query_string\
          \ = urlencode(query_params, doseq=True, safe='+')\n        full_url = f\"\
          {base_url}?{query_string}\"\n        \n        headers = {\n           \
          \ \"Content-Type\": \"application/json; charset=utf-8\",\n            \"\
          Accept\": \"application/json; charset=utf-8\"\n        }\n        \n   \
          \     # 发送请求\n        response = requests.get(full_url, headers=headers,\
          \ timeout=30.0)\n        response.raise_for_status()\n        \n       \
          \ return response.json()\n        \n    except requests.exceptions.Timeout:\n\
          \        return {}\n    except requests.exceptions.RequestException as e:\n\
          \        return {}\n    except json.JSONDecodeError as e:\n        return\
          \ {}\n    except Exception as e:\n        return {}\n\ndef format_orders_text(orders:\
          \ List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> str:\n    \"\"\"\n    格式化商品信息为文本\n    \"\"\"\n\
          \    if not orders:\n        return \"暂无商品数据\"\n    \n    try:\n       \
          \ texts = []\n        for i, order in enumerate(orders[:30], 1):  # 最多显示30个商品\n\
          \            goods_name = order.get(\"goods_name\", \"N/A\")\n         \
          \   text = f\"{goods_name}\"\n            texts.append(text)\n        \n\
          \        return \",\".join(texts)\n        \n    except Exception as e:\n\
          \        return f\"共{len(orders)}条商品数据（注意：当前每次最多返回10条）\"\n\ndef query_orders(params:\
          \ Dict[str, Any], dhb_skey: str, current_manager_api: str) -> Dict[str,\
          \ Any]:\n    \"\"\"\n    查询商品\n    \n    Args:\n        params: 查询参数字典\n\
          \        dhb_skey: 用户认证密钥\n        current_manager_api: 管理API地址\n      \
          \  \n    Returns:\n        查询结果字典\n    \"\"\"\n    result = {\n        \"\
          success\": False,\n        \"message\": \"\",\n        \"ai_agent_manager_goods\"\
          : [],\n        \"ai_agent_manager_goods_text\": \"\"\n    }\n    \n    try:\n\
          \        # 验证必要参数\n        if not dhb_skey or not dhb_skey.strip():\n  \
          \          result[\"message\"] = \"认证密钥无效\"\n            return result\n\
          \        \n        if not current_manager_api or not current_manager_api.strip():\n\
          \            result[\"message\"] = \"API地址无效\"\n            return result\n\
          \        \n        # 确保API地址格式正确\n        if not current_manager_api.startswith((\"\
          http://\", \"https://\")):\n            current_manager_api = f\"https://{current_manager_api}\"\
          \n        \n        # 构建查询参数\n        query_params = build_order_query_params(params)\n\
          \        \n        # 调用商品查询API\n        api_response = make_api_request(query_params,\
          \ dhb_skey, current_manager_api)\n        \n        if not api_response\
          \ or not isinstance(api_response, dict):\n            result[\"message\"\
          ] = \"API返回数据无效\"\n            return result\n        \n        # 检查API响应状态\n\
          \        if api_response.get(\"code\") != 200:\n            msg = api_response.get(\"\
          msg\") or api_response.get(\"message\", \"API请求失败\")\n            result[\"\
          message\"] = f\"API请求失败: {msg}\"\n            return result\n        \n\
          \        # 提取商品数据\n        data = api_response.get(\"data\", {})\n     \
          \   if not isinstance(data, dict):\n            result[\"message\"] = \"\
          API返回数据格式错误\"\n            return result\n        \n        orders = data.get(\"\
          list\", [])\n        if not isinstance(orders, list):\n            orders\
          \ = []\n        \n        # 设置返回结果\n        result[\"success\"] = True\n\
          \        result[\"message\"] = f\"查询成功，共{len(orders)}条商品\"\n        result[\"\
          ai_agent_manager_goods\"] = orders\n        result[\"ai_agent_manager_goods_text\"\
          ] = format_orders_text(orders)\n        \n        return result\n      \
          \  \n    except Exception as e:\n        result[\"message\"] = f\"处理商品查询时发生错误:\
          \ {str(e)}\"\n        return result\n\ndef main(params: Dict[str, Any],\
          \ dhb_skey: str, current_manager_api: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n    \"\"\"\
          \n    Dify工作流主函数 - 商品查询逻辑\n    \n    Args:\n        params: 查询参数字典\n   \
          \     dhb_skey: 用户认证密钥\n        current_manager_api: 管理API地址\n        \n\
          \    Returns:\n        查询结果\n    \"\"\"\n    return query_orders(params,\
          \ dhb_skey, current_manager_api)\n\n# 测试代码\n# if __name__ == \"__main__\"\
          :\n#     import sys\n    \n#     if len(sys.argv) < 4:\n#         print(\"\
          用法: python order_query.py <params_json> <dhb_skey> <current_manager_api>\"\

          \  except json.JSONDecodeError as e:\n#         print(f\"JSON解析错误: {e}\"\
          )\n#         sys.exit(1)"

          \ import urlencode, urljoin\nimport requests\nfrom typing import Dict, Any,\
          \ List\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta\n\ndef build_order_query_params(condition_data:\
          \ Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n    \"\"\"\n    构建客户查询参数\n    \n \
          \   Args:\n        condition_data: 条件参数字典\n        \n    Returns:\n    \
          \    构建好的查询参数\n    \"\"\"\n    # 默认参数\n    params = {\n        \"page\"\
          : 0,\n        \"format\": \"json\",\n        \"hide_canceled\": \"on\",\n\
          \        \"pageSize\": 10\n    }\n    \n    # 从条件数据中提取参数\n    if condition_data:\n\
          \        for key, value in condition_data.items():\n            if value\
          \ is not None and value != \"\":\n                if key == \"type\" and\
          \ value == \"client\":\n                    continue\n\n               \
          \ if key == \"action\":\n                    continue\n\n              \
          \  # 处理时间参数\n                params[key] = str(value)\n    \n    return\
          \ params\n\ndef make_api_request(params: Dict[str, Any], dhb_skey: str,\
          \ current_manager_api: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n    \"\"\"\n    调用客户查询API接口\n\
          \    \n    Args:\n        params: 查询参数\n        dhb_skey: 用户认证密钥\n     \
          \   current_manager_api: 管理API地址\n        \n    Returns:\n        API响应数据\n\
          \    \"\"\"\n    if not current_manager_api:\n        return {}\n    \n\
          \    try:\n        # 构建完整的客户查询URL\n        order_endpoint = \"/Manager/Client/client\"\
          \n        base_url = urljoin(current_manager_api, order_endpoint)\n    \
          \    \n        # 添加认证密钥\n        query_params = params.copy()\n        if\
          \ dhb_skey and dhb_skey.strip():\n            query_params[\"dhb_skey\"\
          ] = dhb_skey\n        \n        # 构建完整URL\n        query_string = urlencode(query_params,\
          \ doseq=True, safe='+')\n        full_url = f\"{base_url}?{query_string}\"\
          \n        \n        headers = {\n            \"Content-Type\": \"application/json;\
          \ charset=utf-8\",\n            \"Accept\": \"application/json; charset=utf-8\"\
          \n        }\n        \n        # 发送请求\n        response = requests.get(full_url,\
          \ headers=headers, timeout=30.0)\n        response.raise_for_status()\n\
          \        \n        return response.json()\n        \n    except requests.exceptions.Timeout:\n\
          \        return {}\n    except requests.exceptions.RequestException as e:\n\
          \        return {}\n    except json.JSONDecodeError as e:\n        return\
          \ {}\n    except Exception as e:\n        return {}\n\ndef format_orders_text(orders:\
          \ List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> str:\n    \"\"\"\n    格式化客户信息为文本\n    \"\"\"\n\
          \    if not orders:\n        return \"暂无客户数据\"\n    \n    try:\n       \
          \ texts = []\n        for i, order in enumerate(orders[:30], 1):  # 最多显示30个客户\n\
          \            client_name = order.get(\"client_name\", \"N/A\")\n       \
          \     text = f\"{client_name}\"\n            texts.append(text)\n      \
          \  \n        return \",\".join(texts)\n        \n    except Exception as\
          \ e:\n        return f\"共{len(orders)}条客户数据（注意：当前每次最多返回10条）\"\n\ndef query_orders(params:\
          \ Dict[str, Any], dhb_skey: str, current_manager_api: str) -> Dict[str,\
          \ Any]:\n    \"\"\"\n    查询客户\n    \n    Args:\n        params: 查询参数字典\n\

          \ try:\n        # 验证必要参数\n        if not dhb_skey or not dhb_skey.strip():\n\

          \        \n        if not current_manager_api or not current_manager_api.strip():\n\
          \            result[\"message\"] = \"API地址无效\"\n            return result\n\
          \        \n        # 确保API地址格式正确\n        if not current_manager_api.startswith((\"\

          \n        \n        # 构建查询参数\n        query_params = build_order_query_params(params)\n\

          \ dhb_skey, current_manager_api)\n        \n        if not api_response\
          \ or not isinstance(api_response, dict):\n            result[\"message\"\
          ] = \"API返回数据无效\"\n            return result\n        \n        # 检查API响应状态\n\
          \        if api_response.get(\"code\") != 200:\n            msg = api_response.get(\"\
          msg\") or api_response.get(\"message\", \"API请求失败\")\n            result[\"\
          message\"] = f\"API请求失败: {msg}\"\n            return result\n        \n\
          \        # 提取客户数据\n        data = api_response.get(\"data\", {})\n     \
          \   if not isinstance(data, dict):\n            result[\"message\"] = \"\
          API返回数据格式错误\"\n            return result\n        \n        orders = data.get(\"\
          list\", [])\n        if not isinstance(orders, list):\n            orders\
          \ = []\n        \n        # 设置返回结果\n        result[\"success\"] = True\n\
          \        result[\"message\"] = f\"查询成功，共{len(orders)}条客户（注意：当前每次最多返回10条）\"\
          \n        result[\"ai_agent_manager_client\"] = orders\n        result[\"\
          ai_agent_manager_client_text\"] = format_orders_text(orders)\n        \n\
          \        return result\n        \n    except Exception as e:\n        result[\"\
          message\"] = f\"处理客户查询时发生错误: {str(e)}\"\n        return result\n\ndef main(params:\
          \ Dict[str, Any], dhb_skey: str, current_manager_api: str) -> Dict[str,\

          #         print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))\n#   \
          \  except json.JSONDecodeError as e:\n#         print(f\"JSON解析错误: {e}\"\
          )\n#         sys.exit(1)"

    - data:
        code: "\"\"\"\n库存查询模块\n接收处理后的参数，查询库存并返回结果\n\"\"\"\n\nimport json\nfrom urllib.parse\
          \ import urlencode, urljoin\nimport requests\nfrom typing import Dict, Any,\
          \ List\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta\n\ndef build_order_query_params(condition_data:\
          \ Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n    \"\"\"\n    构建库存查询参数\n    \n \
          \   Args:\n        condition_data: 条件参数字典\n        \n    Returns:\n    \
          \    构建好的查询参数\n    \"\"\"\n    # 默认参数\n    params = {\n        \"page\"\
          : 1,\n        \"pageSize\": 10\n    }\n    \n    # 从条件数据中提取参数\n    if condition_data:\n\
          \        for key, value in condition_data.items():\n            if value\
          \ is not None and value != \"\":\n                if key == \"type\" and\
          \ value == \"inventory\":\n                    continue\n\n            \
          \    if key == \"action\":\n                    continue\n\n           \
          \     # 处理时间参数\n                params[key] = str(value)\n    \n    return\
          \ params\n\ndef make_api_request(params: Dict[str, Any], dhb_skey: str,\
          \ current_manager_api: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n    \"\"\"\n    调用库存查询API接口\n\
          \    \n    Args:\n        params: 查询参数\n        dhb_skey: 用户认证密钥\n     \
          \   current_manager_api: 管理API地址\n        \n    Returns:\n        API响应数据\n\
          \    \"\"\"\n    if not current_manager_api:\n        return {}\n    \n\
          \    try:\n        # 构建完整的库存查询URL\n        order_endpoint = \"/RestfulApi/situation\"\
          \n        base_url = urljoin(current_manager_api, order_endpoint)\n    \
          \    \n        # 添加认证密钥\n        query_params = params.copy()\n        if\
          \ dhb_skey and dhb_skey.strip():\n            query_params[\"dhb_skey\"\
          ] = dhb_skey\n        \n        # 构建完整URL\n        query_string = urlencode(query_params,\
          \ doseq=True, safe='+')\n        full_url = f\"{base_url}?{query_string}\"\
          \n        \n        headers = {\n            \"Content-Type\": \"application/json;\
          \ charset=utf-8\",\n            \"Accept\": \"application/json; charset=utf-8\"\
          \n        }\n        \n        # 发送请求\n        response = requests.get(full_url,\
          \ headers=headers, timeout=30.0)\n        response.raise_for_status()\n\
          \        \n        return response.json()\n        \n    except requests.exceptions.Timeout:\n\
          \        return {}\n    except requests.exceptions.RequestException as e:\n\
          \        return {}\n    except json.JSONDecodeError as e:\n        return\
          \ {}\n    except Exception as e:\n        return {}\n\ndef format_orders_text(orders:\
          \ List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> str:\n    \"\"\"\n    格式化库存信息为文本\n    \"\"\"\n\
          \    if not orders:\n        return \"暂无库存数据\"\n    \n    try:\n       \
          \ texts = []\n        for i, order in enumerate(orders[:30], 1):  # 最多显示30个商品库存\n\
          \            #orders_num = order.get(\"goods_num\", \"N/A\")\n         \
          \   goods_name = order.get(\"goods_name\", \"N/A\")\n            #available_number\
          \ = order.get(\"available_number\", \"N/A\")\n            #real_number =\
          \ order.get(\"real_number\", \"N/A\")\n            options_name = order.get(\"\
          options_name\", \"N/A\")\n            \n            text = f\"{goods_name}\
          \ {options_name}\"\n            texts.append(text)\n        \n        return\
          \ \",\".join(texts)\n        \n    except Exception as e:\n        return\
          \ f\"共{len(orders)}条库存数据（注意：当前每次最多返回10条）\"\n\ndef query_orders(params: Dict[str,\
          \ Any], dhb_skey: str, current_manager_api: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n  \
          \  \"\"\"\n    查询库存\n    \n    Args:\n        params: 查询参数字典\n        dhb_skey:\
          \ 用户认证密钥\n        current_manager_api: 管理API地址\n        \n    Returns:\n\
          \        查询结果字典\n    \"\"\"\n    result = {\n        \"success\": False,\n\
          \        \"message\": \"\",\n        \"ai_agent_manager_stock\": [],\n \
          \       \"ai_agent_manager_stock_text\": \"\"\n    }\n    \n    try:\n \
          \       # 验证必要参数\n        if not dhb_skey or not dhb_skey.strip():\n   \
          \         result[\"message\"] = \"认证密钥无效\"\n            return result\n\
          \        \n        if not current_manager_api or not current_manager_api.strip():\n\
          \            result[\"message\"] = \"API地址无效\"\n            return result\n\
          \        \n        # 确保API地址格式正确\n        if not current_manager_api.startswith((\"\
          http://\", \"https://\")):\n            current_manager_api = f\"https://{current_manager_api}\"\
          \n        \n        # 构建查询参数\n        query_params = build_order_query_params(params)\n\
          \        \n        # 调用库存查询API\n        api_response = make_api_request(query_params,\
          \ dhb_skey, current_manager_api)\n        \n        if not api_response\
          \ or not isinstance(api_response, dict):\n            result[\"message\"\
          ] = \"API返回数据无效\"\n            return result\n        \n        # 检查API响应状态\n\
          \        if api_response.get(\"code\") != 200:\n            msg = api_response.get(\"\
          msg\") or api_response.get(\"message\", \"API请求失败\")\n            result[\"\
          message\"] = f\"API请求失败: {msg}\"\n            return result\n        \n\
          \        # 提取库存数据\n        data = api_response.get(\"data\", {})\n     \
          \   if not isinstance(data, dict):\n            result[\"message\"] = \"\
          API返回数据格式错误\"\n            return result\n        \n        orders = data.get(\"\
          list\", [])\n        if not isinstance(orders, list):\n            orders\
          \ = []\n        \n        # 设置返回结果\n        result[\"success\"] = True\n\
          \        result[\"message\"] = f\"查询成功，共{len(orders)}条库存（注意：当前每次最多返回10条）\"\
          \n        result[\"ai_agent_manager_stock\"] = orders\n        result[\"\
          ai_agent_manager_stock_text\"] = format_orders_text(orders)\n        \n\
          \        return result\n        \n    except Exception as e:\n        result[\"\
          message\"] = f\"处理库存查询时发生错误: {str(e)}\"\n        return result\n\ndef main(params:\
          \ Dict[str, Any], dhb_skey: str, current_manager_api: str) -> Dict[str,\
          \ Any]:\n    \"\"\"\n    Dify工作流主函数 - 库存查询逻辑\n    \n    Args:\n        params:\
          \ 查询参数字典\n        dhb_skey: 用户认证密钥\n        current_manager_api: 管理API地址\n\
          \        \n    Returns:\n        查询结果\n    \"\"\"\n    return query_orders(params,\
          \ dhb_skey, current_manager_api)\n\n# 测试代码\n# if __name__ == \"__main__\"\
          :\n#     import sys\n    \n#     if len(sys.argv) < 4:\n#         print(\"\
          用法: python order_query.py <params_json> <dhb_skey> <current_manager_api>\"\
          )\n#         print(\"示例: python order_query.py '{\\\"client_id\\\": \\\"\
          1,2\\\"}' 'your_key' 'https://yadmin.example.com'\")\n#         sys.exit(1)\n\
          \    \n#     try:\n#         params = json.loads(sys.argv[1])\n#       \
          \  dhb_skey = sys.argv[2]\n#         current_manager_api = sys.argv[3]\n\
          \        \n#         result = main(params, dhb_skey, current_manager_api)\n\
          #         print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))\n#   \
          \  except json.JSONDecodeError as e:\n#         print(f\"JSON解析错误: {e}\"\
          )\n#         sys.exit(1)"
